Sage Bot Item Code: A227
Star Elixir Artifact

Triggers: Every 3 sec

Great Purification
The artifact owner removes 5 random negative effects from themselves and recovers 350000 health.
Every 3 times the ability is triggered, the artifact owner also removes 7 random negative effects from all allied units and heals them for 375000.

Requirements: 90-100
